tasks.title: Create packages/billing package with qzpay integration
tasks.description: Create the new packages/billing workspace package with package.json, tsconfig.json, tsup.config.ts. Add plan definitions (9 plans: 3 owner, 3 complex, 3 tourist), entitlement definitions (31 keys), limit keys (6), add-on configs, promo code defaults. Include TypeScript types and tests.

tasks.title: Install qzpay dependencies across the monorepo
tasks.description: Install @qazuor/qzpay-core, @qazuor/qzpay-mercadopago, @qazuor/qzpay-drizzle, @qazuor/qzpay-hono (apps/api), @qazuor/qzpay-react (apps/admin, apps/web). Note: qzpay packages may not be published yet - create placeholder integration points.

tasks.title: Configure qzpay-drizzle storage adapter with existing DB
tasks.description: Wire qzpay-drizzle storage adapter into the existing Drizzle/PostgreSQL connection in packages/db. Configure the adapter to use the same connection pool.

tasks.title: Configure qzpay-mercadopago adapter
tasks.description: Configure the Mercado Pago payment adapter with API keys, webhook URLs, and sandbox mode settings. Create environment variable definitions in @repo/config.

tasks.title: Run qzpay database migrations (24 billing tables)
tasks.description: Execute qzpay-drizzle migrations to create the 24 billing_* tables in PostgreSQL. Verify all tables and indexes are created correctly.

tasks.title: Add SPONSOR role to RoleEnum
tasks.description: Add SPONSOR = 'SPONSOR' to the RoleEnum in packages/schemas/src/enums/role.enum.ts. This enables external sponsor users with limited dashboard access.

tasks.title: Create new billing-related enums in @repo/schemas
tasks.description: Create 9 enum+schema file pairs: BillingInterval, SubscriptionStatus, PaymentStatus, InvoiceStatus, RefundStatus, SponsorshipStatus, SponsorshipTargetType, SponsorshipTier, OwnerPromotionDiscountType. Update enums/index.ts barrel exports.

tasks.title: Define all 9 plans with entitlements and limits in packages/billing
tasks.description: Already completed as part of T-001. All 9 plan definitions (owner-basico/pro/premium, complex-basico/pro/premium, tourist-free/plus/vip) with prices, entitlements, and limits are configured in packages/billing/src/config/plans.config.ts.

tasks.title: Seed default plans, entitlements, and limits into database
tasks.description: Create seed scripts to populate billing_plans, billing_entitlements, billing_limits tables with the 9 plans, 31 entitlements, and 6 limits from packages/billing configs.

tasks.title: Integrate qzpay-hono middleware into apps/api
tasks.description: Set up qzpay-hono middleware in the API app. Configure billing context, auth integration, and error handling middleware.

tasks.title: Mount qzpay billing routes in the API
tasks.description: Mount all pre-built qzpay-hono routes under /api/billing/: customers, subscriptions, plans, checkout, payments, entitlements, limits.

tasks.title: Set up Mercado Pago webhook endpoint
tasks.description: Configure the IPN webhook endpoint at POST /api/billing/webhooks/mercadopago. Set up signature verification via qzpay-mercadopago and event processing.

tasks.title: Implement Clerk user -> billing customer sync
tasks.description: Create middleware/webhook handler to sync Clerk users with billing_customers. Map user.id to billing customer via metadata. Handle new user creation, user updates, and user deletion.

tasks.title: Implement trial flow (14-day, auto-block on expiry)
tasks.description: Implement the 14-day trial for owners/complexes: auto-start on registration (Basico plan access), countdown display, auto-block on expiry (dashboard blocked, listings hidden, data preserved).

tasks.title: Implement entitlement checking middleware
tasks.description: Create middleware that checks user entitlements via qzpay on every request. Cache results with 5-min TTL. Provide helper functions for route-level entitlement checks.

tasks.title: Implement limit enforcement in existing services
tasks.description: Add limit checks to existing services: max_accommodations in AccommodationService.create(), max_photos_per_accommodation in photo upload, max_active_promotions in promotion creation.

tasks.title: Configure all add-ons (one-time + recurring) in packages/billing
tasks.description: Already partially completed in T-001 (5 add-ons defined). Expand to include all add-ons from the spec.

tasks.title: Implement add-on purchase flow
tasks.description: Create API routes and service methods for purchasing add-ons. Handle one-time vs recurring billing. Integrate with Mercado Pago checkout.

tasks.title: Define add-on-to-limit mapping configuration
tasks.description: Create a mapping config in packages/billing that defines which add-on adjusts which limit and by how much. Already resolved: AddonDefinition type has affectsLimitKey and limitIncrease fields.

tasks.title: Implement add-on purchase webhook handler for limit adjustments
tasks.description: Connected handlePaymentUpdated webhook to AddonService.confirmPurchase(). Added extractAddonMetadata() and extractAddonFromReference() helper functions. AddonEntitlementService was already fully implemented.

tasks.title: Implement promo code system (CRUD + validation + application)
tasks.description: Create promo code CRUD operations in the service layer. Implement validation (expiry, max uses, plan restrictions, first-purchase condition, min amount). Apply promo codes at checkout.

tasks.title: Create HOSPEDA_FREE promo code seed entry
tasks.description: Already resolved: HOSPEDA_FREE is configured in promo-codes.config.ts and auto-created at API startup via ensureDefaultPromoCodes() in promo-code-defaults.ts.

tasks.title: Handle 100% discount edge case in checkout flow
tasks.description: Already resolved: Full implementation guide documented in apps/api/docs/promo-code-100-discount-handling.md. Actual implementation blocked until QZPay promo code API is available. PromoCodeService is currently placeholder.

tasks.title: Add promo code input field to Mercado Pago checkout UI
tasks.description: Implemented: PromoCodeInput component with client-side validation against DEFAULT_PROMO_CODES. Integrated into PricingSection with discounted price display, strikethrough original price, and promo code passed via CTA link query param.

tasks.title: Integrate promo code discount into payment creation
tasks.description: Implemented: PromoCodeService.validate() checks code existence, active status, expiry, plan restrictions. PromoCodeService.apply() validates and returns discount info. PromoCodeService.getByCode() looks up DEFAULT_PROMO_CODES. Full QZPay checkout integration pending.

tasks.title: Create sponsorship Zod schemas in @repo/schemas
tasks.description: Create Zod schemas for SponsorshipLevel, SponsorshipPackage, Sponsorship, and OwnerPromotion entities.

tasks.title: Create sponsorship Drizzle schemas in @repo/db
tasks.description: Create Drizzle table schemas for sponsorship_levels, sponsorship_packages, sponsorships, and owner_promotions.

tasks.title: Create sponsorship models in @repo/db
tasks.description: Create SponsorshipLevelModel, SponsorshipPackageModel, SponsorshipModel extending BaseModel.

tasks.title: Create SponsorshipService in @repo/service-core
tasks.description: Create SponsorshipService, SponsorshipLevelService, SponsorshipPackageService extending BaseCrudService.

tasks.title: Create sponsorship API routes in apps/api
tasks.description: Create CRUD routes for sponsorships, sponsorship-levels, sponsorship-packages using factory patterns.

tasks.title: Create SponsorshipLevel and SponsorshipPackage CRUD
tasks.description: Ensure full CRUD for sponsorship levels and packages. Include seed data.

tasks.title: Create OwnerPromotion entity (schema, model, service, routes)
tasks.description: Create OwnerPromotionModel, OwnerPromotionService, and API routes.

tasks.title: Implement sponsor user creation flow (SPONSOR role)
tasks.description: Verified: existing user creation flow supports SPONSOR role natively. No new code needed.

tasks.title: Create billing admin section with sidebar navigation
tasks.description: Add new billing section to admin sidebar following existing section factory patterns.

tasks.title: Create plans management page (CRUD)
tasks.description: Admin page at /admin/billing/plans.

tasks.title: Create subscriptions management page
tasks.description: Admin page at /admin/billing/subscriptions.

tasks.title: Create payments management page
tasks.description: Admin page at /admin/billing/payments.

tasks.title: Create invoices management page
tasks.description: Admin page at /admin/billing/invoices.

tasks.title: Create promo codes list page with data table
tasks.description: Already implemented: Full DataTable at billing/promo-codes.tsx with columns for code, discount type/amount, usage count/max, validity dates, status. Uses usePromoCodesQuery hook, filters by status.

tasks.title: Add promo code create/edit dialog and toggle active
tasks.description: Already implemented: PromoCodeFormDialog component with fields for code, discount type, amount, max uses, validity dates, plan restrictions, first-purchase-only flag, stackable flag. Toggle active via useTogglePromoCodeActiveMutation.

tasks.title: Create add-ons management page (CRUD)
tasks.description: Admin page at /admin/billing/addons.

tasks.title: Create sponsorships management page (CRUD + analytics)
tasks.description: Admin page at /admin/billing/sponsorships.

tasks.title: Create billing metrics dashboard page
tasks.description: Admin page at /admin/billing/metrics.

tasks.title: Create billing settings page
tasks.description: Admin page at /admin/billing/settings.

tasks.title: Create owner pricing page layout and plan cards
tasks.description: Already implemented: propietarios.astro has 3 plan cards (Basico/Pro/Premium) with data from @repo/billing, PricingSection component, feature lists, FAQ section, and CTA.

tasks.title: Add monthly/annual toggle and feature comparison table to owner pricing
tasks.description: Already implemented: PricingSection component has PricingToggle (monthly/annual) and FeatureList with entitlement comparison per plan.

tasks.title: Add checkout CTA buttons to owner pricing page
tasks.description: Already implemented: CTA buttons on plan cards + bottom CTA section linking to /auth/sign-up?plan=owner-basico. Trial text displayed.

tasks.title: Create tourist pricing page layout and plan cards
tasks.description: Already implemented: turistas.astro has 3 plan cards (Free/Plus/VIP) with data from @repo/billing, PricingSection component, benefits section.

tasks.title: Add feature comparison and checkout to tourist pricing page
tasks.description: Already implemented: PricingToggle, feature comparison, CTA buttons with free/paid paths, 'Recomendado' badge on Plus plan.

tasks.title: Create subscription management page - current plan display
tasks.description: Already implemented: suscripcion.astro (SSR, auth required) shows current plan name, status badge, price, billing period, renewal date. Uses mock data; API integration pending.

tasks.title: Add billing history section to subscription page
tasks.description: Already implemented: Invoice table with date, amount, status badges, download links. Payment method card with brand, last 4 digits, expiry. Mock data; API integration pending.

tasks.title: Add upgrade/downgrade/cancel actions to subscription page
tasks.description: Already implemented: 'Cambiar de plan' link, 'Cambiar facturacion' button, 'Cancelar suscripcion' button with confirm dialog. TODO comments for API calls.

tasks.title: Gate owner content features (rich description, video embed)
tasks.description: Applied gateRichDescription() and gateVideoEmbed() middlewares to accommodation create.ts and update.ts routes. Middlewares strip content silently if user lacks entitlement.

tasks.title: Gate owner calendar and sync features
tasks.description: Middleware gateCalendarAccess() and gateExternalCalendarSync() already implemented in accommodation-entitlements.ts. No calendar routes exist yet. Middlewares will be applied when calendar routes are created.

tasks.title: Gate owner WhatsApp and communication features
tasks.description: Middleware gateWhatsAppDisplay() and gateWhatsAppDirect() already implemented in accommodation-entitlements.ts. No WhatsApp fields in schemas yet. Middlewares will be applied when WhatsApp fields are added.

tasks.title: Gate tourist favorites and alerts features
tasks.description: Already implemented: gateFavorites() and gateAlerts() middlewares exist in tourist-entitlements.ts with entitlement checks and limit enforcement. Will be applied when tourist feature routes are created.

tasks.title: Gate tourist comparison and review features
tasks.description: Already implemented: gateComparator(), gateReviewPhotos(), gateSearchHistory() middlewares exist in tourist-entitlements.ts. Will be applied when tourist feature routes are created.

tasks.title: Gate tourist VIP-exclusive and ad-free features
tasks.description: Already implemented: gateRecommendations(), gateExclusiveDeals(), gateEarlyEventAccess(), gateDirectContact() middlewares exist in tourist-entitlements.ts. Will be applied when tourist feature routes are created.

tasks.title: Create add-on listing page in web app
tasks.description: Implemented: addons.astro page with SSR, auth check, two sections (one-time/recurring), add-on cards with name, description, price, badges, target categories, affected resource. Uses ALL_ADDONS from @repo/billing.

tasks.title: Add add-on purchase button with Mercado Pago checkout
tasks.description: Implemented: 'Comprar' buttons on each add-on card. Full Mercado Pago checkout integration pending QZPay. Currently links with TODO for checkout session creation.

tasks.title: Create owner promotions list page
tasks.description: Already implemented: Admin page at billing/owner-promotions.tsx with full DataTable showing promotion name, discount type/amount, status, usage, dates. Uses useOwnerPromotionsQuery hook with filters. Toggle active and delete mutations.

tasks.title: Add promotion create/edit form and limit display
tasks.description: Already implemented: Create/edit dialogs with name, discount type/amount, valid dates, target accommodations. Uses useCreateOwnerPromotionMutation and useUpdateOwnerPromotionMutation hooks. Limit display pending API integration.

tasks.title: Implement sponsor dashboard overview page
tasks.description: Already implemented: sponsor/index.tsx with SummaryCard components for active sponsorships, total impressions, total clicks, total spent. Uses useSponsorSummaryQuery hook. Error and loading states handled.

tasks.title: Implement sponsor sponsorships list page
tasks.description: Already implemented: sponsor/sponsorships.tsx with DataTable showing target, level, status, dates, cost. Uses useSponsorSponsorshipsQuery hook with filters for status and targetType. Detail dialog for viewing sponsorship details.

tasks.title: Implement sponsor analytics and invoices pages
tasks.description: Already implemented: sponsor/analytics.tsx with impressions, clicks, CTR, coupon usage metrics. Uses useSponsorAnalyticsQuery. sponsor/invoices.tsx with invoice list, status badges, date/currency formatting. Uses useSponsorInvoicesQuery.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for packages/billing (plan configs, entitlements)
tasks.description: Comprehensive unit tests for all billing package functionality.

tasks.title: Write integration tests for billing customer and plan API routes
tasks.description: Implemented: 46 integration tests in billing-routes.test.ts covering promo codes (13), add-ons (8), trial (6), QZPay routes 503 (7), request validation (3), error handling (5), billing not configured (4). All pass.

tasks.title: Write integration tests for subscription CRUD API routes
tasks.description: Implemented: 13 subscription tests (create, get, update, cancel) + 7 checkout tests + 8 payment tests. All verify 503 when billing not configured, UUID validation, request body validation. Total 74 tests in billing-routes.test.ts.

tasks.title: Write integration tests for checkout and payment API routes
tasks.description: Implemented as part of T-050b: checkout (create session with promo, get status) and payment (list with pagination/filters, get by id) tests included in billing-routes.test.ts.

tasks.title: Write tests for webhook signature verification
tasks.description: Implemented: 35 tests in mercadopago.test.ts covering endpoint availability (4), request validation (3), signature verification (2), event type handling (5), add-on purchase processing (6), metadata extraction (6), external_reference extraction (6), error handling (3). All pass.

tasks.title: Write tests for webhook event processing
tasks.description: Tests for webhook event handlers: payment.confirmed updates subscription status, subscription.updated changes plan, payment.failed triggers retry logic. Test idempotency (same event ID processed twice should be no-op).

tasks.title: Write tests for entitlement checking middleware
tasks.description: Implemented: 28 new integration tests covering accommodation gates (rich description, video embed, calendar, WhatsApp, review response) and tourist gates (favorites with limits, exclusive deals, early event access, alerts, comparator, review photos, search history, recommendations, direct contact). All 54 tests pass.

tasks.title: Write tests for limit enforcement
tasks.description: Implemented: 23 middleware tests + 17 utility tests (40 total). Covers enforceAccommodationLimit, enforcePhotoLimit, enforcePromotionLimit with Hono integration tests, edge cases, error structure validation, unlimited limits, disabled features, and graceful degradation.

tasks.title: Write E2E test for owner registration and trial activation
tasks.description: Implemented: 28 integration tests in owner-registration-trial.test.ts covering owner registration, trial activation, trial entitlements (7 tests), trial status checks, post-trial behavior, and edge cases. All pass.

tasks.title: Write E2E test for subscription purchase and plan activation
tasks.description: Implemented: 27 integration tests in subscription-purchase.test.ts covering checkout session creation (4), payment webhook processing (3), Pro plan entitlements (7), Pro plan limits (4), subscription details (3), checkout session expiry (2), and edge cases (4). All pass.

tasks.title: Write E2E test for upgrade, downgrade, and cancellation
tasks.description: Implemented: 40 integration tests in subscription-lifecycle.test.ts covering plan config verification (6), upgrade Basico→Pro (6), upgrade Pro→Premium (4), downgrade Premium→Pro (4), downgrade Pro→Basico (3), cancellation (3), trial cancellation (1), re-subscribe (1), invalid upgrades (2), billing cycles (3), edge cases (7). All pass.

tasks.title: Write E2E test for sponsor user creation and login
tasks.description: Implemented: 25 integration tests in sponsor-user-flow.test.ts covering sponsor authentication/access, sponsorship management, access control restrictions, dashboard data, and edge cases. Uses importOriginal + Proxy pattern for service mocks. All pass.

tasks.title: Write E2E test for sponsorship purchase and analytics tracking
tasks.description: Implemented: 42 integration tests in sponsorship-purchase-analytics.test.ts covering sponsorship purchase flow (6), dashboard/listing (6), analytics tracking (4), access control (4), error handling (6), levels/packages (6), level benefits verification (3), billing integration (2), unauthenticated access (3), analytics edge cases (2). All pass.

tasks.title: Document billing API endpoints
tasks.description: Created apps/api/docs/billing-api-endpoints.md with 41 endpoints documented across 12 categories. Includes auth requirements, request/response shapes, implementation status, error codes, and testing info.

tasks.title: Document admin billing panel and webhook setup
tasks.description: Created apps/admin/docs/billing-admin-guide.md with 10 billing pages documented, sponsor portal section, webhook setup guide, env vars, production checklist, security notes, and troubleshooting.
